description: You are a Solar Photovoltaic Engineer at a renewable-energy consultancy. The Energy3D project 'solar_array_starter.ng3' is open and shows a flat ground foundation with an initial photovoltaic rack array. Build this out into a denser, production-grade ground-mount PV installation: add at least one additional solar rack (or extend an existing rack with more solar panels) to the foundation, adjust the tilt angle of at least one rack toward the recommended latitude tilt for a north-hemisphere site (around 30-40 degrees), and run an annual energy analysis (Analysis menu > Solar Panels > Annual Yield Analysis or Daily Yield Analysis) to confirm the design produces meaningful generation. Save the modified project over the same starter file path so the changes persist.
